# 04 — Investment documents (from the issuer / regional center)

**Sensitivity: MEDIUM.** These come from the project and define your investment. They contain
deal terms but generally not your personal financial data.

## What goes here
- Private Placement Memorandum (PPM)
- Subscription agreement (your signed copy)
- NCE governing documents (limited partnership / operating agreement)
- Escrow agreement
- Evidence of your capital contribution into the new commercial enterprise (NCE)
- The project's **I-956F** approval notice (or the filing receipt, if still pending)
- Business plan and economic / job-creation report, if the issuer provided them

## What does NOT go here
- Your transfer trail → `03_Path_of_Funds/`
- Your independent vetting of the project → `06_Project_Due_Diligence/`

## Naming convention
`Project-DocType.pdf` (e.g., `ProjectX-PPM.pdf`, `ProjectX-Subscription.pdf`,
`ProjectX-I956F-Approval.pdf`).

## Common attorney follow-ups — answer these up front
- Is the I-956F **approved**, or only filed? Have the notice/receipt ready.
- Is your subscription agreement the **fully executed** version (all signatures)?
- Does the escrow agreement state exactly **when** and **to whom** your funds release?
- Do the documents name the same NCE / regional center consistently?

## Completeness tip
Prefer fully-executed, signed copies over drafts. A draft subscription or an unsigned escrow
is an incomplete item.
